subject: Follow-up on the May architecture workshop
paragraphs: Thank you for hosting our team during the architecture workshop in May. We appreciated the open discussion and the clear picture your engineers gave us of the current platform.

As agreed, we have summarised the findings and recommendations in a separate report, which you will receive within the next two weeks. The highest-priority item remains the migration of the rendering pipeline to a containerised service.
Please do not hesitate to contact us if you have questions in the meantime, or if you would like to schedule a follow-up session with the wider team.
